name: codex-science
description: An auditable scientific workbench with live metadata connectors, evals, and bounded improvement loops

interface.shortDescription: Auditable research from question to artifact
interface.longDescription: Coordinate evidence-led literature research with Crossref, PubMed and OpenAlex metadata; dataset lineage; preregistered experiments; reproducible artifacts; same-task agent evals; independent review; and bounded improvement loops.
defaultPrompt: Turn my research question into an auditable end-to-end study.
Search scientific metadata and build a source-to-claim synthesis.
Run and compare a reproducible scientific-agent benchmark.
